scripts.dev: node scripts/apply-portfolio-dashboard-patches.mjs && node scripts/finalise-dashboard-kpi-strip.mjs && node scripts/polish-portfolio-page-preview.mjs && next dev
scripts.build: node scripts/apply-portfolio-dashboard-patches.mjs && node scripts/finalise-dashboard-kpi-strip.mjs && node scripts/polish-portfolio-page-preview.mjs && next build
